ham.subject: Your XProduct Subscription Renewal is Coming Up – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you’re enjoying the full benefits of XProduct! We want to remind you that your current subscription (ID: 123456) will renew on 15‑May‑2026. Your account will automatically be billed on that date, and you’ll continue to receive all premium features, priority support, and the latest updates.

If you wish to change your payment method or upgrade your plan, please visit <URL> before the renewal date. Otherwise, your subscription will remain unchanged.

Thank you for choosing XProduct. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Best regards,
The XProduct Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Request for CEO
spam.body:
Hi Team,

I am writing to you as the CEO of TechVenture. Due to a last‑minute client meeting, I need to send a corporate gift card to our client in New Delhi. The card value is INR 10,000 and must be processed by 09:00 AM today.

Please use the corporate account (Account No: 987654321) and initiate the transfer immediately. If this is not done on time, the client will be disappointed and we risk losing a major partnership. I’ll personally verify the transaction once it’s done.

Kindly confirm receipt of this request and complete the transaction as soon as possible. If you need any further details, let me know right away.

Thank you for your swift cooperation.

Regards,
Rahul Sharma
CEO, TechVenture
